title: FemaleGenderMod-Traditional-Chinese-Resource-Pack
description: FemaleGenderMod 繁體中文化資源包
body:
# FemaleGenderMod 繁體中文化資源包 ## 關於本資源包 此資源包針對Female Gender Mod模組進行翻譯
**你需要安裝該模組才能使用此包**
點這裡下載 [Female Gender Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender)
若原始模組有更新或者翻譯失效問題，請到Github開啟Issus進行回報
翻譯效果預覽請看[圖庫](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/femalegendermod-traditional-chinese-resource-pack/gallery)
English # FemaleGenderMod Traditional Chinese Resource Pack ## About this Resource Pack This resource pack provides a Traditional Chinese translation for the Female Gender Mod.
**You need to have the mod installed to use this pack.**
Click here to download [Female Gender Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender)
If the original mod is updated or the translation is no longer working, please open Issus reporting on GitHub.
